description: UI/UX flow for the WaTech Application Inventory web app. Organized by role. All screens must meet WCAG 2.2 AA and follow USWDS component standards.
globalPrinciples: All screens meet WCAG 2.2 AA — keyboard navigable, screen reader compatible, sufficient color contrast
USWDS components used throughout — no custom components unless no USWDS equivalent exists
Agency users only ever see their own agency data
watech_admin sees all agency data with clear agency context always visible
Destructive-looking actions (retire, revert) require confirmation before executing
All forms show inline validation with plain-language error messages
Every controlled field uses a USWDS select or combo box — no free text where a controlled value is required

authentication.description: Login flow via Entra ID SSO

steps.description: Simple landing page with WaTech branding (USWDS). Single 'Sign In' button.
Redirect to WA State Entra ID login. Handled entirely by Microsoft — no custom UI.
actions: Authenticate via WA State Entra ID

steps.description: After login, system checks user role and agency assignment. If no role found, show access pending screen.
actions: Redirect to dashboard based on role

steps.description: Shown when a user has authenticated but has no role assigned yet. Displays contact info for their agency admin.

screens.description: Agency inventory overview. Shows summary cards: total applications, stale records, lifecycle breakdown, and certification status for current year.
components: USWDS Alert for stale or certification warnings

screens.description: Paginated, sortable, filterable table of all agency applications. Stale records highlighted. Retired records shown with visual indicator but not hidden.
Full view of a single application record. Shows all fields, current values, and last reviewed date. Audit history tab shows full field-level change log.
Form to create or update an application record. Controlled fields use USWDS Select or Combo Box. Required fields clearly marked. Inline validation on submit.
Confirmation modal before retiring an application. Clearly states this is reversible. Requires user to confirm.
Confirmation modal before reverting a retired application back to active. Shows previous lifecycle status.

Certification flow for agency_admin. Shows certification checklist: total records reviewed, stale records blocking submission, and attestation statement. Blocked if stale records exceed threshold defined in business rules.
In-app notification center. Lists all notifications for the user with read/unread status. Links directly to relevant application record.
Cross-agency overview. Shows statewide summary: total agencies, total applications, agencies with stale records, certification completion by agency for current year.
Same as agency Application List view but accessed by WaTech admin for any agency. Agency name always visible in header for context.
Cross-agency analysis view. Filterable by vendor, technology type, lifecycle status, AI enablement. Highlights duplication and consolidation candidates.
views: Central Services Candidates (same vendor/type used by 3+ agencies)

screens.description: Admin UI for configuring notification thresholds, staleness rules, and certification deadlines. No code deployment required.
Manage users and role assignments across all agencies. WaTech admins can assign roles; agency admins can manage their own agency users only.
Review and approve annual certification submissions from agencies. Shows submission date, submitter, and inventory summary.
